summary: Partial Subscriber Feed Select modal - Live
description:
GIVEN a user is a free subscriber
OR a user is a single team subscriber
OR a user is not logged in/anonymous

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a game tile for a game they are not entitled
steps.result:
THEN the following text is displayed in the Feed Select modal "[MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV] Subscription Required", "You need an active [MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV] subscription to view this game. [MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV] Single Team subscribers, click your team’s broadcast. New users please visit [www.mlb.com/|http://www.mlb.com/]<device> to purchase.", "Full Game Access"
AND an [Upgrade [MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV]] button is displayed below "Full Game Access"
